name: 35-invalid-attestation-subject-digest
description: The DSSE statement is well formed and passes every shape check: exactly two subjects, valid digest algorithm, matching artifactRoles. The aibom subject sha256 is a forged value (deadbeef...) that does not match the real fixture-35.aibom.json bytes. This is the stale-or-forged attestation case from GHSA-mjjm-8wx7-m38f: prior to digest binding the validator accepted any sha256 value as long as the shape was correct.
notes: Verification must bind subject digests to artifact bytes, not just check shape. The cdx subject digest is correct so only the aibom subject triggers the rejection.
